source_section.title_label_raw: Built Form and Siting Requirements within the DND and H Zones Applicability

sections.title_label_raw: Siting Requirements within the DND and H Zones Applicability

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements within the DND and H Zones Applicability
provisions.text: Any main building erected, constructed, reconstructed, altered, or located, or an addition to any main building, within a DND or H zone shall meet the built form and siting requirements of this Chapter. Maximum Building Height

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed
provisions.text: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed the maximum required building height specified on Schedule 15. Minimum Front or Flanking Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 300(2), any portion of a main building,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 300(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 300(2), any portion of a main building, either above or below grade, shall have a minimum required front or flanking setback as specified on Schedule 18.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 300(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: If a minimum front or flanking setback has not been specified on Schedule 18, the minimum required front or flanking setback shall be 3.0 metres. Side Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 301(2) and 301(3), the minimum

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 301(2) and 301(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 301(2) and 301(3), the minimum required side setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 301(2) and 301(3), the minimum
provisions.text: where a lot line abuts a lot, any portion of which, is zoned HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, PCF, or RPK zone, 10.0 metres from the side lot line abutting the lot; or (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 301(2) and 301(3), the minimum
Subject to Subsections 301(2) and 301(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Underground parking structures are not required to have a minimum side setback, providing they do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade in any side yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 301(2) and 301(3), the minimum
provisions.text: For any high-rise building, any portion of the main building above the streetwall height shall have a minimum required setback of 12.5 metres from any side lot line.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 301(2) and 301(3), the minimum
provisions.text: There is no maximum required side setback. Rear Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 302(2) and 302(3), the minimum

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 302(2) and 302(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 302(2) and 302(3), the minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 302(2) and 302(3), the minimum
provisions.text: where a lot line abuts a lot, any portion of which, is zoned HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, PCF, or RPK zone, 10.0 metres from the rear lot line abutting the lot; or (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 302(2) and 302(3), the minimum
Subject to Subsections 302(2) and 302(3), the minimum
provisions.text: Underground parking structures are not required to have a minimum rear setback, providing they do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade in any rear yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 302(2) and 302(3), the minimum
provisions.text: For any high-rise building, any portion of the main building above the streetwall height shall have a minimum required setback of 12.5 metres from any rear lot line. Maximum Lot Coverage

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 302(2), the maximum required lot

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 302(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 302(2), the maximum required lot coverage shall be 80%.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 302(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no greater than 20.0 square metres, shall be exempted from the maximum required lot coverage calculation. Accessory Structures and Shipping Containers

sections.title_label_raw: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the
provisions.text: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter 19.
